individuals.mission: We believe every life should be lived fully, confidently and without fear.
individuals.description: Personal security for everyone in every situation. Whether you're uneasy or in danger, Bond is only a tap away. Our technology, services and Personal Security Agents are available 24/7.

services.name: 24/7 Security Agents
services.description: Bond Personal Security Agents are specially trained to support you in a wide variety of security situations
services.howItWorks: Bond operates through a Command Center staffed with trained Personal Security Agents available 24/7. We're here to help you and your loved ones with any security need. Whether you want us to accompany you walking the dog, coordinate roadside assistance, connect you to a Dr., or set up a virtual check-in on you or loved ones at a time and frequency you designate, there's no security need too small.

services.name: Track Me On The Go
services.description: Bond monitors your journey and confirms your safety upon arrival. Connect with an Agent at any time.
services.howItWorks: Walking home alone at night. Taking public transportation in an unfamiliar area. You're okay, but the situation makes you uneasy. Bond will monitor your location until we confirm you've safely arrived at your destination. If you don't arrive within the ETA, or happen to deviate from your route, we'll check in with you and, if need be, escalate the situation to your emergency contact. If you seem unsafe, we'll even coordinate with first responders until they get to you, critical if you're in a high-alert scenario unable to speak to 911 yourself. Bond will send authorities key information like your photo and GPS coordinates so they can potentially reach you faster.
features: We confirm your safety upon arrival
Connect with an Agent at any time
Auto-escalation if you don't arrive on time
Sends photo and GPS to first responders

services.name: Ready An Agent
services.description: Press and hold anywhere on your screen to put a Security Agent on standby. Use when uncomfortable but don't want to speak yet.
services.howItWorks: If you think that trouble might arise and you want to put a Security Agent on standby, use our Ready An Agent service. Just press and hold the Ready An Agent button on your Bond app. Back at the Command Center, a Personal Security Agent will be on alert. When you release the button, you'll be connected with an Agent who can assist you. If you don't respond, we'll coordinate with the authorities.
features: Press and hold anywhere on your screen
Use in situations when you're uncomfortable but don't want to speak to an agent yet
Conceal your phone to avoid drawing attention
Agent on standby at Command Center

services.name: Video Monitor Me
services.description: A Personal Security Agent will quickly be by your side via live video, monitoring you and your surroundings
services.howItWorks: When you tap Video Monitor Me, a Personal Security Agent will quickly be by your side via live video. They'll know to immediately begin monitoring you and your surroundings. Keep the Agent with you until you feel safe again. If the situation escalates, our Agent will advise you or coordinate with the authorities if necessary.
features: Personal Security Agent to virtually accompany you
Immediate assessment of your situation and surroundings
Agent stays with you until safe

services.name: Send Me A Car
services.description: Bond dispatches a nearby car to take you to a safer location. No ridesharing account required. Works even if you're on the move.
services.howItWorks: Everyday situations can sometimes become scary. Maybe you are walking to your car in a dark parking lot or from the office at night. When this happens, sometimes it's best to leave as quickly as possible. With the tap of a button, Bond Personal Security Agents will be with you via video to find a nearby place for you to go and direct a rideshare car to pick you up. No fumbling between apps, no rideshare account required. We'll even help the driver find you if you're on the move.
features: We dispatch a nearby car to take you to a safer location
Works even if you're on the move

services.name: Siren
services.description: Turn your phone into a siren. Bright flashing lights and loud noise alert others nearby and discourage unwanted company.
services.howItWorks: If you're uncomfortable and want to draw attention to yourself, simply hold for 3 seconds to activate Siren. The bright flashing lights and loud noise will alert others nearby and work to discourage unwanted company. With Bond Premium, we'll automatically connect you with an Agent when the countdown timer finishes. If necessary, we'll coordinate with the authorities on your behalf. You can also connect with a Personal Security Agent or cancel Siren at any time.
features: Lights and sound will alert bystanders
With Bond Premium, we coordinate with the authorities if necessary

services.name: Dial 911
services.description: Fast dial 911 with immediate connection to emergency services

services.name: Location Services
services.description: Keep track of your loved ones with real-time location mapping and arrival/departure notifications
services.howItWorks: It's normal to feel nervous when someone you love is running unusually late or fails to check-in. In moments like these, Location Services can give you peace of mind. Bond can keep you better connected to family and friends, and share everyone's real-time whereabouts on an interactive map. You can see where people are and in which direction they're moving. You'll even receive app notifications when your family and friends arrive or leave their destination.
features: Keep track of your loved ones

services.name: Road Assistance
services.description: Roadside assistance service available through Bond for stranded situations

services.name: Telemedicine
services.description: Connect with medical professionals remotely for health concerns

services.name: Security Check
services.description: Schedule virtual check-ins at times and frequencies you designate for you or loved ones

services.name: Body Guard
services.description: Schedule professional bodyguard services on-demand through the app. Former FBI and Homeland Security agents available.

useCases: Walking alone at night after work or social events
Late night commutes on public transportation
Running or exercising in isolated areas
Real estate agents meeting strangers at properties
First dates or meeting new people
benefits: Carry the power of your own Personal Security Agent in your pocket
Never feel alone or vulnerable in uncertain situations
Professional security that travels with you wherever you go
Affordable monthly subscription instead of expensive bodyguard services
Instant access to help without the stigma of calling 911
Peace of mind for solo travelers and late-night workers

pricing.trial: 3 days free trial of Bond Premium services

details: 5 Engagements Per Month with Security Agents
Cars To Pick You Up* (extra cost)

tiers.name: Premium Plus

Cars To Pick You Up* (extra cost)

families.tagline: Security and Peace of Mind for Your Whole Family
families.mission: We believe families should live freely, knowing everyone they love is protected.
families.description: Bond reimagines family safety with professional security services for everyone in your household. From teenagers to elderly parents, keep your whole family protected with one comprehensive solution.

services.name: Family Location Services
services.description: Monitor the real-time location of all family members from a single dashboard

services.name: 24/7 Security Agents
services.description: Professional security agents available to any family member, anytime

services.name: Track Family Members
services.description: Know when loved ones arrive home safely or need assistance during travel

services.name: Teen Safety Monitoring
services.description: Give teens independence while maintaining parental peace of mind

services.name: Elderly Parent Care
services.description: Monitor aging parents with respect for their independence

services.name: College Student Protection
services.description: Keep students safe on and off campus with 24/7 monitoring

services.name: Emergency Response for All
services.description: Entire family covered under one plan with shared emergency services

services.name: Body Guard Services
services.description: Professional protection for family events during uncertain times

services.name: Family Check-Ins
services.description: Automated safety checks and status updates for all family members

services.name: Multi-Device Support
services.description: Connect unlimited family members under one family plan

useCases: Teenagers going out with friends or to school
College students living away from home
Elderly parents who live alone or have health concerns
Family members who work late or irregular hours
Children walking to school or activities
Family events during civil unrest or protests
Vacation travel with the whole family
benefits: One subscription protects your entire family
Parent dashboard to monitor all family members
Give children independence without sacrificing safety
Peace of mind knowing everyone is protected 24/7
Professional security service formerly available only to executives
Affordable alternative to hiring individual bodyguards
Emergency coordination for any family member in need

family_focus.quote: Until now we had no easy and affordable resource to turn to in order to provide safety and security for me and my family. Our bodyguards were former FBI and Homeland Security agents who are highly professional and experienced. They made me and my family feel extremely safe and secure.
family_focus.author: Ken P.
family_focus.context: Used Bond for family event during civil unrest

pricing.model: Family plan with multiple users - same tiered structure as individuals

24/7 Security Agents for any family member

shared.tagline: The New Frontier In Personal Security
shared.headline: Whatever the need. Whenever it arises. In any situation.
shared.description: Bond's suite of Personal Security services are available 24/7, enabled by people and technology you can trust.

command_center.title: Command Center & Security Agents
command_center.subtitle: Our Personal Security Agents are here to help you.
command_center.description: Bond operates through a Command Center staffed with trained Personal Security Agents available 24/7. We're here to help you and your loved ones with any security need. Whether you want us to accompany you walking the dog, coordinate roadside assistance, connect you to a Dr., or set up a virtual check-in on you or loved ones at a time and frequency you designate, there's no security need too small. Our Personal Security Agents and partnerships with top providers give us an unparalleled ability to help keep you and your loved ones feeling safer.

shared.key_differentiator: Personal security is no longer just for a select few. It's for all of us.

endorsements.name: Raymond Kelly
endorsements.title: Former NYPD Commissioner, Bond Advisor
endorsements.quote: Bond offers a unique and valuable service, enhancing peace-of-mind and personal security for individuals and families. In particular, I see great value in Bond's 24/7 Personal Security Agents and the novel array of preventative services.

endorsements.name: Bill Craig
endorsements.title: Former Chief of Police, Bond Advisor
endorsements.quote: Bond services, particularly the preventative services, are aimed at helping reduce crime as well as increasing personal safety. Their trained Personal Security Agents are available 24/7 to help provide support.
